title: viola pusilla
intro: Viola pusilla, also known as the small field pansy or dwarf pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola pusilla include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, as well as its ability to act as a natural remedy for skin issues and wounds. Viola pusilla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications for its medicinal properties.
